title: Automatic Deposition of DAN Matrix using a TM Sprayer for MALDI Analysis of Lipids
author: Elizabeth Neumann
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bt8hnrt6

steps.title: Remove slides from freezer and place in desiccator for 00:30:00
steps.instruction: Remove slides from freezer and place in desiccator for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Scan for autofluorescence on Zeiss Axio Scanner
steps.instruction: Scan for autofluorescence on Zeiss Axio Scanner.

steps.title: Change nitrogen to 6 psi and turn on sprayer
steps.instruction: Change nitrogen to 6 psi and turn on sprayer.

steps.title: Open software and set nozzle temperature to 40 °C
steps.instruction: Open software and set nozzle temperature to 40 °C

steps.title: Change LC solvent to A1 to 100% acetonitrile at 0
steps.instruction: Change LC solvent to A1 to 100% acetonitrile at 0.05 mL/min.

steps.title: “Load” sample loop with 5 mL acetonitrile
steps.instruction: “Load” sample loop with 5 mL acetonitrile.

steps.title: Switch sprayer to “Inject” and spray for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Switch sprayer to “Inject” and spray for 2 minutes.

steps.title: “Load” 6 mL of matrix solution into sprayer loop
steps.instruction: “Load” 6 mL of matrix solution into sprayer loop.

steps.title: Switch sprayer to “Inject” and spray for ~1 minute
steps.instruction: Switch sprayer to “Inject” and spray for ~1 minute. Use slide to check that matrix is flowing.

steps.title: Tape slide(s) onto 75 °C heated...
steps.instruction: Tape slide(s) onto 75 °C heated block on top of stage and adjust software scanning area.

steps.title: Set method in software
steps.instruction: Set method in software: 1350 mm/min nozzle velocity 1.5 mm track spacing 0.05 mL/min flow rate CC Pattern 2 L/min flow rate 5 passes 40mm nozzle height No drying time

steps.title: Save method and make sure it is highlighted
steps.instruction: Save method and make sure it is highlighted.

steps.title: Under Cycle, click “Start,” then click “Continue
steps.instruction: Under Cycle, click “Start,” then click “Continue.”

steps.title: When finished, remove slide and place in slide box
steps.instruction: When finished, remove slide and place in slide box.

steps.title: Set TM sprayer temperature to 30 °C
steps.instruction: Set TM sprayer temperature to 30 °C .

steps.title: Switch A1 solvent line to 100%...
steps.instruction: Switch A1 solvent line to 100% ACN and set flow rate to 1 mL/min.

steps.title: “Load” loop with 20 mL acetonitrile...
steps.instruction: “Load” loop with 20 mL acetonitrile and “Inject” loop for 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Spray tip of nozzle with 5 mL of MEOH
steps.instruction: Spray tip of nozzle with 5 mL of MEOH.

steps.title: Log the pressure at your flow rate post cleaning
steps.instruction: Log the pressure at your flow rate post cleaning. It must be within 3-4 psi of the starting pressure; if it is not, the cleaning procedure must be repeated.

steps.title: Change the HLPC flow rate to 0
steps.instruction: Change the HLPC flow rate to 0.05 mL/min.

steps.title: Spray nozzle with methanol
steps.instruction: Spray nozzle with methanol.

steps.title: Remove the foil and wipe stage down with methanol
steps.instruction: Remove the foil and wipe stage down with methanol.

steps.title: Replace wypall and bench diapers
steps.instruction: Replace wypall and bench diapers.

steps.title: Place all syringes in the biohazard...
steps.instruction: Place all syringes in the biohazard container and empty the solvent waste.

steps.title: Shut down the software and turn off the TM Sprayer
steps.instruction: Shut down the software and turn off the TM Sprayer.

steps.title: Shut the nitrogen off
steps.instruction: Shut the nitrogen off.
